title: VS Addition
description: A small addon adds compats for VS2
body:
# VS Addition

An addon that adds more compat to VS2.

![mechanical arm and display link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc56d2bc73fd98c38444af6af065b75029666971.gif)

Implemented features include the Craete mod's mechanical arm and portable interface for transferring items between ships/from ships to the world, the Create Big Cannon mod's recoil when firing on a ship, and bringing back Computer Craft compat in 1.20.1.


For more features, you can _browse past posts_ in the Valkyrien Skies [Discord server](https://discord.gg/aWeNDCUTS6) _showcase channel_ and try them out in-game.


**Warning: This mod is still in alpha and it may break your game**

You can report bugs or make feature requests in [Github issues](https://github.com/xiewuzhiying/VS-Addition/issues).
